ChangeRequest.name: `FinRep`.`Other financial liabilities` covered?
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview
It seems that the `FinRep` concept `Other financial liabilities` is not (fully?) covered in the `BIRD LDM`, except for `Advances` acting in the role of `Balance sheet recognised financial liabilities`.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at
### Background information
#### EBA ITS [Annex V - Reporting on Financial Information](https://www.eba.europa.eu/sites/default/files/documents/10180/2321183/b67323ac-27fa-482d-926e-ae7ba3e90cb8/Annex%20III%20%28Annex%205%20%28FINREP%29%29.pdf)
See [Annex V - Reporting on Financial Information](https://www.eba.europa.eu/sites/default/files/documents/10180/2321183/b67323ac-27fa-482d-926e-ae7ba3e90cb8/Annex%20III%20%28Annex%205%20%28FINREP%29%29.pdf), 5.3 Financial liabilities, (38), (39), and (41).
"_38. ‘Other financial liabilities’ shall include all financial liabilities other than derivatives, short positions, deposits and debt securities issued._"
"_39. Under IFRS ‘Other financial liabilities’ shall include financial guarantees given where they are measured either at fair value through profit or loss [IFRS 9.4.2.1(a)] or at the amount initially recognised less cumulative amortization [IFRS 9.4.2.1(c)(ii)]. Loan commitments given shall be reported as ‘Other financial liabilities’ where they are designated as financial iabilities at fair value through profit or loss [IFRS 9.4.2.1(a)] or they are commitments to provide a loan at a below-market interest rate [IFRS 9.2.3(c), IFRS 9.4.2.1(d)]._"
"_41. ‘Other financial liabilities’ shall also include dividends to be paid, amounts payable in respect of suspense and transit items, and amounts payable in respect of future settlements of transactions in securities or foreign exchange transactions where payables for transactions are recognised before the payment date._"
#### [Austrian input approach documentation](https://www.oenb.at/mdi/entity/startPage?lang=DE)
In the [Austrian input approach documentation](https://www.oenb.at/mdi/entity/startPage?lang=DE), for example the following (aggregated) items are considered as `FinRep`.`Other financial liabilities`: Short-term liabilities to employees, Liabilities to providers of critical services, Liabilities to system providers due within 7 days as well as some residual (other financial liability) item.
### Points/Questions to resolve
* assess if the above described 'products' / 'use cases' are covered in the `BIRD LDM`, * if so, there is nothing to do. * if not, start 'information gathering' in order to begin with an adequate model design covering these 'products' / 'use cases'
### Related issues
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
